KULUMBUNUNA 
Kwiza  chakulinangula chachihya, echi chinalumuna vilongeselo vyakutanga  chakalikilamu 
inemanyina  hauhashi wakunangakana vyuma (competence based curriculum)  chinanehe 
kwalumuka mukulinangula vyuma kuhichila mukuvilinga kaha nachilingisa valongi kukwata 
chinyingi chamumyaka ino mukuzamikisa kupwa nachinyingi chakuzata milimo yakumavoko.  
Uno mukanda wavilongeselo vyamwakunangwila vakashikola vali mufwomu 1 vanausoneka 
mujila yauhashi wakunangakana vyuma vyanangwilo najishimbi jakumona nge kulinangula 
chinalitoto  nakayoyelo kavathu. Mauhashi akunangakana vyuma vanahake mukalikilamu ya 
2023  osena analitasana navyuma vyanangwilo vanasoneka mumukanda uno  
Mukanada uno unemanyina hakukafwa  milongeshi  vanakunangula seteko yavalongi  vali 
mufwomu 1 kunangula vilongeselo vyakalikulumu inemanyina hakunangula valongi vyuma 
vatela kulinga  (competence based curriculum) halwola kunahono mikanda vanetavila kuzachisa 
mumashikola. Echi chili nakusolola kufwila chamuthango wafulumende watala vyamashilo 
kumona ngana ngwavo milimo yamulongeshi vanayashiwisa. Hakulinga ngocho, milongeshi 
vatela kuzachisa chinyingi valinacho chakutanga nakuwana vyuma vikwavo navivakafwako 
mukunangula valongi mumaukalu vanahase kuwana mukunangula vilongeselo evi .  
Ngunachifwelela ngwami milongeshi navazachisa mukanda ou mujila yakwoloka.  
 
Kelvin Mambwe (PhD) 
Permanent Secretary- Educational Services 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

Page | 5  
 
 
KUSAKWILILA 
Mukanda uno wavilongeselo  vyakutanga Litilicha mu Luvale kuli valongi mu form 1   
vaulongesele kuhichila mukuhulyojola vathu vavavulu  nakuhomesa vathu hamwe. Vathu 
vavavulu hamwe kaha namauka avathu akulisezaseza vavahulishile nakuvahana nawa lisesa 
lyakuhana vishinganyeka vyavo havyuma vyatela kusonekewa mumukanda uno. Hakulinga 
ngocho, ngunahane kusakwilila chami kuli vathu vosena, namauka akulisezaseza  ahanyine 
chinyingi chavo hamwe kaha nakukafwa chamali chinahashisa kusoneka naukufwatula mukanda 
uno wavinangwilo. Ava vanapu milongeshi,vakhuluwa vahajizemba, mauka akulihandununa 
hamwe kaha navambwembwa. 
Mukukumisa, ngunasakwilila kulihana chavakakuza vakuchihanda chatala vilongeselo vyakutanga 
mumashikola cha Directorate of Curriculum Developmen hakuzata nakumona ngana ngwavo 
mulimo wakosoneka mukanda wakunangula vakashikola unazachiwa mujila yamwenemwene 
 
Charles Ndakala, (Dr.) 
Director – Curriculum Development 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

Page | 11  
 
KUJIMBULA 
Mukanda uno wavilongeselo vyakunangula va fwomu 1  vanausoneka mangana ukafweko milongeshi 
mukunangula valongi vinangwilo vya Luvale. Mukalikilamu vanalumuna.  Uno mukanda wavinangwilo  
vanausoneka managana uzachiwe mukwashiwisa kunangula valongi  vatete navaputuka  kulinangula 
vilongeselo vya 2023 kalikilamu shimbu kanda  kupwenga  kulongesa nakusonejeka  mikanda  ivene  
vatela kuzachisa mukutanga nakutangisa. Mukutwalililaho, uno mukada uli nakusolola kufwila 
nakulihana chafulumende kuhichila kumuthango watala vyamashikola mukuputuka  kunangula 
vyakwalumuka chakutanga kalikilamu ya 2023 nawa inamono ngana ngwayo vyuma vanasoneka 
mumukanda uno vinatemo mukunangula valongi vyuma navalinangula nakuzata namavoko avo kweseka 
naseteko yakunangakana chalwola tunahetemo. 
Numba tuhu uno mukanda vanaukupwisa nakuzamikisa vyuma vyakunangula valongi, milongeshi vatela 
kuzachisa chinyingi nauhashi wakutanga chavo nakumona ngana ngwavo vali nakuhakilako vyuma 
vikwaavo vinahase kuzamikisa kutanga chavalongi chikumanyi haze vanamono ngana ngwavo hali 
liphwata. Kuhakilako nawa,  milongeshi vanahase kwalumuna milimo chipwe vyuma navalinga valongi  
vili mumukanda uno kweseka nakupwa chashikola  nashikola vali nakutangilamo valongi. 
Vilongeselo vyosena vili mumukanda uno vanavijinyina mukumona ngana ngwavo valongi vali 
nakulinangula vyuma navalinga namavoko avo anakuzamikisa nawa kujiminyina muvishinganyeka kaha 
nawa nakumona ngana nge khala  chihela  chipwe shikola valiho valongi  vanahase kulinangula mujila 
yamwenemwene. Echi kuvwovuwa khana chinemanyinana hakuhana uswa wakutanga  nakunganyala 
chakalikiilamu yakukupuka                       kuli khala longi chakuzeneka kutala okwo afuma chipwe omu 
apwa. 
Hilufwelelo lwakumona nge mukanda ou  navinangwilo vilimo vavimone kulema  kupwa vyuma 
navikafwa milongeshi kunangula  valongi chinyingi, uhashi nalilimi lyaLuvale  navilinga 
vyamwenemwene mukulinangula chakukupuka. 
MWAKUZACHISHILA MUKANDA 
Mukanda  ou unahane vyuma vize navatangisa muthemu 2 mu fwomu 1. Vanaupange mumitwe 
yavihande kaha mutwe wachihande uli navyuma vyakulihandununa vyakufwana nge kuhanjika 
na kwivwilila, kutanga chakujimina na kusoneka. Vyuma vili  omu mumukanda kavyeshi 
vilongeseloko oloze vyakuzachisa kusoneka vilongeselo.Hakuwahisa  vilongeselo watela 
kufumisa vihanda vya mutwe wachihande kuvyuma vyakulisezaseza. Chinjikizo, mutwe

Page | 12  
 
wachihande watela kupwa kuhanjika na kwivwilila, mazu, kutanga na kusoneka. Omu nauwahisa 
mutwe wachihande watela kusakula vyuma vyakunangula namilimo oyo vatela  kuzata nauhashi 
wakunangakana. Shikaho mutwe wachihande naupwa nauhashi wakunangakana vyuma 
vyavivulu.Ngocho, watela kusakula chuma echi nachimbata lwola lwalunene muchihande chove. 
Kuhakilako nawa, milimo vanakuhane mumukandavene ou kawatela kuyikumisa muchihande 
chimweko. Evi vanahase kuvikilikita muvilongeselo vyakulihandununa  handununa. 
MWAKUNANGWILA 
Hakunangula, mutwe wachihande 
watela kukavangiza jijila jakutangiwiilamo. Echi 
nachikukafwa kutangisa chinangwilo hichinangwilo vanale.

CHIHANDE CHIVENE: KUSHIMUTWILA 
 
Kwaula: Mutwe wachihande uno nauya nakweulula valongi hachihande chakushimutwila. 
Mutwe wachihande ou uli namitwe yavihande itanu. Mitwe yavihande eyi inapu; kuhanjika 
nakwivwilila, kutanga, kusoneka, mwaya lilimi, nakwalumuna mujimbu.  
Uhashi wakunangakana vyuma: Chihande echi nacheulula valongi ulemu watwama 
hakushimutwila. 
 
KWIVWILILA NAKUHANJIKA 
Chihande: Shimutwilo  
Mutwe Wachihande: Kulipula Phami 
Kujimbula:  Mutwe wachihande ou naweulula valongi kushimutwila navakwavo chikumanyi 
hakulipula jiphami.  
Uhashi Wakunangakana Chuma: Kulipula jiphami hamutwe wachihande vanakuhane. 
Kasangumwiso: Kutangisa mwana waphwevo kwenyeka mali. Unetava tahi nyi chiku?    
Mulimo: Kulipula jiphami havihande vyavyashi vyakufwna nge kwalumuka chajingonde, 
kuzachisa vitumbo mujila yakuluwa, lusesa…  
Mulongeshi: Ahane vihande kuli valongi. 
Valongi 
  
Valipule jiphami. 
Seteko Yakunangakana:  Vihande vyavyashi vanalipikilavyo jiphami mujila yakutesamo..  
Kweulula Mulongeshi: Kushimutwila chakuhichila mukulipula jiphami chapwa jila imwe 
yakuhishilamo vishinganyeka vyavalongi.  
Kulipula jiphami chasakiwa mazavu atatu. Lisavu lyavakakwitavila chihande, likwavo lyavaze 
vanakuhamika kaha lizavu lyamakumishilo lyapwa lyavachambamilonga. Vachambamilonga 
milimo yavo yakwivwilila kujiphami naunjiho wakufuma kumazavu avali awa. Awa mazavu 
anakulihamika kakavulu atela kupwa navathu vatatu halizavu hilizavu.

 Mukakuhanjika wakavanga mwafuma kusali yavaze vanakwitavila chihande  
 Wakushisamo uze wakavanga kusali yavaze vanakuhamika chihande  
 Hatela kukava mukakuhanjika wamuchivali kulizavu lyavakakwitavila chihande. Atela 
kupwa

kuhanjika hamazu vanahanjika kuli mukwavo nakuwafulilila mangana amukunyule.  
 Mwamukava nawa mukwavo wamuchivali kusali yavaze vanahamika chihande. Atela 
kupwa mukakwivwilila kukuhanjika chamukakwitavila chihande wakavanga mangana 
shimbukanda ahanjike mazu enyi nakuhana unjiho wakupayisa nacho vakwavo, atela

 Lwola lumwe hanahase kukava chihanda chavihula. Aha lizavu hilizavu nalihasa kuhula

 Kukhukulula cheji kwizanga kusongo kuli mukakuhanjika wamuchitatu owu mwajika

Vinoma: Mapapilo namikanda 
Esekelo:  Valongi valipule jiphami hamitwe yavihande eyi chipwe yekha mwavahana 
mulongeshi. 
1. Vakashikola vatela kuvetavisa kuzachisa jishinga.  
2. Chisemi waphwevo alema kuhambakana chisemi walunga.  
3. Ngonde yavula ikhiko ngonde yamwaza kuhambakana ngonde yachishika.  
Kukhukulula: Chihande echi chineulula valongi mwakulipulila jiphami.

Chihande 2: Kutanga Nakwivwishisa  
Kujimbula: Valongi navatanga mujimbu nakuwivwishisa kaha kusongo navakumbulula vihula 
vyakufuma hamujimbu. Valongi nawa vatela kulinangula mazu amahya vanazachisa 
mumujimbu.   
Uhashi Wakunangakana chuma: Kutanga nakwivwishisa mikanda yakulihandununa kweseka 
naseteko yavo.  
Kasangumwiso: Tanga chimbwa chamujimbu nakulamuna kaha hula valongi vambulule 
chihande chivene chili muchimbwa unatange.   
Mulimo Watete Kutanga mikanda yakulihandununa.   
Mulongeshi: Alweze valongi vatange mikanda   
Valongi: Vatange mijimbu  
KUSHIMUTWILA 
Kushimutwila chawahila nge muli muvavali chipwe muvavulu. Muthu umwe kuhasa 
kushimutwila ukha wenyi chiku. Kushimutwila mujila yamwenemwene cheji kutunga usendo 
nakukafwa vathu kulipangila vishinganyeka vyavo navakwavo chipwe navathu veka vaze 
kawalithachikiza navoko.  Chapwa chachilemu kuthachikiza mwakushimutwila navakwenu. 
 
Shimbu kanda kumbombola vihande, chapwa chuma chimwe chachilemu chikuma kuputuka 
nakulimeka chakufwana nge “Chimene mwane,” chipwe “Mwayoyo mwane?” mazu awa 
nawahasa kukasununa vathu nakuhasa kushimutwila hachihande chipwe vihande vyeka. 
Muchisemwa cha Luvale, chapwa chachilemu chikuma kumeka vathu chipwe wavathachikiza 
chipwe kawavathachikizako. Nge waliwane namuthu mujila, kawatela kulihita nenyi kahako

Page | 23  
 
oloze watela kulimeneka nenyi. Chikwavo nawa, kapwa kasautu nge kanyike mwameneka 
mukulwane. Mulimo wakanyike wapwa kulomba mukulwane amumeneke.  
 
Nge mwakushimutwila namukwenu chipwe navakwenu, chapwa chachilemu kutengeleka 
matwitwi nakwivwilila vinavahanjika vakwenu. Nge muthu umwe nakuhanjika, mukwavo 
chipwe vakwavo vatela kulihulika nakwivwilila mokomoko nou mwevwa vishinganyeka 
vyamukwavo wauchi. Muze mukwivwilila nawa, chapwa chachilemu kulitala hameso mwomwo 
cheji kukafwako uze ali nakuhanjika kuthachikiza ngwenyi uli nakwivwilila.  
 
Kushimutwila kachapwa kuzachisa mazu kahako oloze vilyo vyamujimba vyakufwana nge 
mavoko, mutwe nameso vyeji kuhakilangako kulumbunwiso yamazu tweji kuhanjikanga. 
Chinjikizo chimwe nge muthu nakwaula chihande chaushona, lizu nameso enyi nawa vyeji 
kusololanga ushona.  
 
Mukushimutwila nawa, chapwa chachilemu kuwana mutwe chipwe mitwe yavihande ize 
navazanga kushimutwila vathu vose. Nge nauneha mutwe wachihande uze kavazangile 
vakwenuko, kushimutwila chenu nachipwa nakanengauli mwomwo vekha navaputuka 
kunongoka kaha vakwavo vanahase kulikatukila nakuliyila kumilimo yavo yekha chipwe 
vapwanga nakutonda kushimutwila navakwavo.

MUJIMBU 
Kumyaka yakunyima vathu vanashimutwilanga navathu vakwakusuku mujijila jekha najekha, 
mumafuchi amavulu. Vathu vanazachisanga jijila jakulihandununa jakutuminangamo mijimbu. 
Myaka, kafwe makhombakakaji avali anahichimo Vahelase vapwilenga nakuzachisanga 
vakakulaha jimbushi chikuma kutwalanga mijimbu kuvihela vyakulisezaseza. 
Valingilenga ngana; mukakulaha watete alahilenga thunda yakuheta kujikilomita 30 chipwe 50 
nakutwala mujimbu kuli mukakulaha wamuchivali ngocho likha swi-i nomu mijimbu 
wahetelenga kuli mwenyavo. Eyi yapwilenga jila yamwaza, olozenyi jila khana yapwilenga 
yaphonde. Hamwe mukakulaha phamo nalivulumuna chipwe kuhokoka, chipwe kumulya kuli 
tunyama vamumusenge, vyuma vize vyahoneselenga shimbu jimwe kuhetesanga mijimbu. 
Vaka Britain vakushikulu vawikilenga kakahya hajiphili jajisuku chikuma mangana nge nakwiza 
vakhakole vahone kwingila mulifuchi lyavo hakumona kaze kakahya nawishi wasolokelenga nge 
mavwi. Mu Africa nawa vapwilenga najijila javo vapwilenga nakutuminangamo mijimbu. Jijila 
khana shina yakwimba jingoma, kundonda muliyanda chipwe jila ize yakuwika kakahya. 
Muyachi himuyachi wapwile najila javo vapwilenga nakwimbilamo jingoma, kaha ngoma

Page | 38  
 
hingoma yapwilenga nalumbunwiso yamazu akulweza vathu. Jingoma jimwe nge navajimba 
kaha jalumbununa kutuma mijimbu chipwe Mwangana ali nakwendela ize ngalila. Nge 
navandonda muliyanda shimbu yayisuku oku ali nakuhajika mazu kulweza uze afumineho nge 
haze hembo hali kufwa mangana uze afumineho kwoshoko ali evwenga muchima lukuluku

MUJIMBU 
                                      CHIKASHA CHAKUSWAMA 
Kwapwile ngalila imwe yayindende chikuma yapwile mukachi kajiphili, mwapwile puho 
yakwamba nge mwapwile chikasha vavumbikile mumavu mukachi kamusenge. Echi chikasha 
ngwavo vachilaminenga kumukana watushilikilo, shikaho kuvanga kaha vathu vaze 
vakuzangama nachinyingi vakhiko kaha vanahase kuchiwana nakuchimbata. 
Likumbi limwe hanonga, vanyike vatatu Chitengi, Kahuma na Muzala vakatukile nakuya 
nakuchitonda. Valongejekele tuvyakulya nameya nakukatuka ungeji wavo wakuya mumusenge. 
Vendele thando yayisuku vahetele hangalila imwe hapwile lilolwa lyakukejima, aha halilolwa 
hapwile kashilikilo kakavanga: 
“Kechi nguwamutonyiko, oloze ngunahase kukola. Kangwatwama namapwapwako oloze 
nangutondewa peho. Yami iya?”  
Ava vanyike valikulile mumitwe yavo,” kahaze chuma mukechi?” Chitengi mwahulisa. 
Kahuma nakushinganyeka kaha Muzala mwamwesula nakuhanjika,” kakahya!”. Omu

Page | 68  
 
akumishile kahanjike kapyapya kakandende kajila kakuswama kalisolwele, kakuvalweka 
mutamba wakuya muze mumusenge. Vendele chindende vawanyine kashilikilo kamuchivali 
haphili: 
“Kuvangila kungupazula shimbu kanda unguzachise. Yami iya?”    
Chitengi mwalikuka munyima, eyi yayikalu, shimbu yayindende himwahanjika 
mukukasumuka ngwenyi, ‘liulu/litunga/likolo!’ Ize phili yayengunukile nakujimuka shikaho 
vahashile kumona jila nakuhita.  
Vahetele jino mulilolwa mwapwile milima kwapwile chikolo chachikungo, haze 
hachikolo vasonekeleho kashilikilo kamakumishilo:  
Muze uli nakumbata vyavivulu, hakhiko uli nakusezelako vyavivulu kunyima. Yami iya?   
Ava masepa vatwamine hamavu nakushinganyeka chikuma. Kahuma akatukile 
nakwenda jithambo jivali chifutanyima jivali cheka kulutwe, kajingili kaha, “mangano!” 
atambakanyine. “Muze uli nakutambuka nakuya mangano amavulu uli nakuwaseza kunyima!” 
Chikolo chaphulikile hakachi, kusolola chikasha chamwaza chakuvyakuma, nakalipepa 
kakusoneka ngwavo: “kuli ove wakuzangama nakumika, echi chikasha chove. Anuka ngwove, 
chuma chachilemu chamwaza nawa shina kuwana tushilikilo twamwakuyoyela hano 
hamavu”. Omu vachisokolwele vawanyinemo ulu napalata yayivulu, shikaho ava masepa 
vapwile mahando naunyike wavo mwomwo yakashishi nakushinganyeka washi.

Myaso yachisemwa 
Valuvale vapwa vathu vamwe vazanga kwimba myaso yachisemwa chikuma. Myaso yapwa 
yayilemu chikuma mukuyoya chamuthu.  Myaso eyi yeji kutangisanga vanyike chipwe 
vakulwane hamitwe yavihande vyakulihandununa chikuma. Mitwe yavihande evi, yapwa 
yayilemu chikuma. Shikaho, vathu veji kulinangulanga chinyingi chamitwe yavihande evi 
kuhichila mumyaso yachisemwa. 
Myaso yachisemwa veji kuyimbanga havilika vyakulihandununa mangana valemese 
vakakuluka javo, kuvalomba kuvakisula chipwe kutukinga kuchina nakupwa phonde chipwe 
vyuma vize vyavipi. 
Myaso yachisemwa yeji kulingisanga vathu kulinunga halwola lwakuwahilila chipwe ukalu. 
Myaso yachisemwa yatwama nanganyo yayinene chikuma. Myaso eyi yeji kweulula vathu 
haulemu wakulemesa vathu muvitungilo naulemu wakuzata nangolo muvyuma vyavivulu. 
Myaso yachisemwa veji kuyimbanga hakusemuka chakhemba, hakumbata nakusomboka, 
hakufwa chipwe havilika vyakufwana nge mikanda namatungu. Myaso eyi yatwama nanganyo 
yayinene chikuma kuli vathu kaha yeji kutangisanga vathu jijila jize jamwaza vatela 
kutwaminamo muvitungilo vyavo.
